recommendations.title: Cats
recommendations.overview: A tribe of cats called the Jellicles must decide yearly which one will ascend to the Heaviside Layer and come back to a new Jellicle life.

recommendations.title: Les Misérables

recommendations.title: The King's Speech
recommendations.overview: The King's Speech tells the story of the man who became King George VI, the father of Queen Elizabeth II. After his brother abdicates, George ('Bertie') reluctantly assumes the throne. Plagued by a dreaded stutter and considered unfit to be king, Ber

recommendations.title: The Damned United

recommendations.title: Snow White: A Tale of Terror

recommendations.title: White God
recommendations.overview: 13 year old Lili fights to protect her dog Hagen, and is devastated when her father sets Hagen free on the streets. Still innocently believing love can conquer any difficulty, Lili sets out to save her dog. Failing in his desperate efforts to find hi

recommendations.title: Laurence Anyways
recommendations.overview: The story of an impossible love between a woman named Fred and a transgender woman named Laurence who reveals her inner desire to become her true self.

recommendations.title: A Beautiful Mind
recommendations.overview: From the heights of notoriety to the depths of depravity, John Forbes Nash Jr. experiences it all. As a brilliant but socially awkward mathematician, he made a groundbreaking discovery early in his career and stands on the brink of international accl

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young transgender man explores his gender identity and searches for love in rural Nebraska.

recommendations.title: Transamerica
recommendations.overview: A transgender woman takes an unexpected journey when she learns that she had a son, now a teenage runaway hustling on the streets of New York.
